message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-omjmu (target/iterable unhashable)

Fixed in commit 4c74980.  dijkstra_path_length and bellman_ford_
path_length now hash-check target before the silent-False
membership branch; all_shortest_paths hash-checks target up front;
bfs_layers wrapped as a Python function that hash-validates every
source in the iterable (was a Rust-direct re-export).

Sweep: 7004 passed, 0 failed (+21 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
